meaning: vi.<美俚> 强求,督促,经常性地发牢骚,抱怨n.<美俚> 催逼的人,吹毛求疵的人,老找碴的人
examples: I'm sorry. I don't mean to be a kvetch.
Denverites often kvetch about sleep disrupted by the Denver Police Department's helicopter orbiting overhead.
Daniel Hamermesh of the University of Texas at Austin calls this a "yuppie kvetch".
If I can't kvetch, I can't do my job.
